name: transport unstable error matches websocket close
description: 验证 WebSocket closed by peer 会被识别成传输层不稳定，避免继续发送兜底消息。

name: transport unstable error matches websocket timeout
description: 验证 WebSocket / sendMsg 超时会被识别成传输层不稳定。

args.message: sendMsg Timeout on websocket call api

name: transport unstable error ignores generic exception
description: 验证普通异常不会被误判成链路不稳，便于保留其它错误处理逻辑。
